CNN representing the Iranian regime?


Brent Scher (@BrentScher)

This is an insane story, and it gets crazier. The Telegraph took down the image of CNN officials shaking hands with Iranian officials after @newsbusters wrote about it.

What’s the cost of nuclear missiles fired at our country, you degenerate demagogue.


Adam Schiff (@SenAdamSchiff)

The cost of building a new hospital is about $100 million. 

We're dropping the equivalent of 10 hospitals a day on Iran.

Trump decided this war was a better use of taxpayer money than giving Americans health care. It’s not.
